name: Fantasy Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave margarine in a 4-quart microwave-safe bowl on HIGH (100%) for 1 minute or until melted.
2. Add sugar and milk; mix well.
3. Microwave on HIGH for 5 minutes or until mixture begins to boil, stirring after 3 minutes.
4. Mix well; scrape the bowl. Continue microwaving on HIGH for another 5 1/2 minutes; stir after 3 minutes.
5. Stir in chocolate chips until melted.
6. Add remaining ingredients; mix well.
7. Pour into a greased 9-inch square pan or 13x9-inch baking pan.
8. Cool at room temperature; cut into squares.
Makes 3 pounds.
From: Kraft General Foods Holiday Homecoming (1991)
